title: Indicator
description: A badge-like component that indicates status, alerts, or notifications on top of other UI elements.
summary: A small visual indicator used to display status or alerts over other elements.

body.raw:
## Usage

Basic usage example to quickly see how the `Indicator` works.

<IndicatorDemosUsage />

## Properties

Interactive configurator to explore customization options for the `Indicator` component.

<IndicatorDemosConfigurator />

## API References

### Styles API

```ts
type T = "root" | "indicator";
type Unstyled = boolean | Partial<Record<__Selector, boolean>>;
```

| Styles API    | Type                                  | Default     | Annotation                                    |
| ------------- | ------------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?`   | `Unstyled`                            | `undefined` | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |
| className`?`  | `string`                              | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`                |
| style`?`      | `CSSProperties & Record<string, any>` | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`                |
| classNames`?` | `Partial<Record<T, string>>`          | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`                |
| styles`?`     | `Partial<Record<T, CSSProperties>>`   | `undefined` | pass to root component `<div>`                |
| color`?`      | `CSSProperties["color"]`              | `undefined` | Determines to indicator color                 |
| size`?`       | `number \| string`                    | `10`        | Indicator width and height                    |
| round`?`      | `string \| number`                    | `999`       | Key of valid CSS value to set `border-radius` |

### Props API

| Props API     | Type                | Default          | Annotation                                                                                          |
| ------------- | ------------------- | ---------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| position`?`   | `IndicatorPosition` | `"top-end"`      | Indicator position relative to the target element                                                   |
| offset`?`     | `number`            | equals to `size` | Indicator offset relative to the target element, usually used for elements with border-radius       |
| inline`?`     | `boolean`           | `false`          | Determines whether the indicator container should be an inline element                              |
| label`?`      | `ReactNode`         | `undefined`      | Label rendered inside the indicator, for example, notification count                                |
| withBorder`?` | `boolean`           | `false`          | Determines whether the indicator should have a border (color of the border is the same as the body) |
| disabled`?`   | `boolean`           | `false`          | When Indicator is disabled it renders children only                                                 |
| processing`?` | `boolean`           | `false`          | Determines whether the indicator should have processing animation                                   |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="indicator" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(o,{name:"indicator",code:`import * as React from "react";\r
import { cnx, cvx, ocx, rem, type cvxVariants } from "xuxi";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
const classes = cvx({\r
  variants: {\r
    selector: {\r
      root: "relative",\r
      indicator: "absolute z-[200] flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap p-1 text-xs leading-none select-none leading-[0] [transform:translate(var(--indicator-translate-x),var(--indicator-translate-y))]"\r
    },\r
    processing: {\r
      true: "before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[var(--indicator-color,inherit)] before:rounded-[--indicator-round,9999px] before:-z-1 data-[processing]:before:content-[''] data-[processing]:before:[animation:processing_1000ms_linear_infinite]"\r
    },\r
    position: {\r
      "top-start": "top-[--indicator-top] left-[--indicator-left]",\r
      "top-center": "top-[--indicator-top] left-[--indicator-left]",\r
      "top-end": "top-[--indicator-top] right-[--indicator-right]",\r
      "middle-start": "top-[--indicator-top] left-[--indicator-left]",\r
      "middle-center": "top-[--indicator-top] left-[--indicator-left]",\r
      "middle-end": "top-[--indicator-top] right-[--indicator-right]",\r
      "bottom-start": "bottom-[--indicator-bottom] left-[--indicator-left]",\r
      "bottom-center": "bottom-[--indicator-bottom] left-[--indicator-left]",\r
      "bottom-end": "bottom-[--indicator-bottom] right-[--indicator-right]"\r
    }\r
  }\r
});\r
\r
type __Selector = NonNullable<cvxVariants<typeof classes>["selector"]>;\r
type IndicatorPosition = NonNullable<cvxVariants<typeof classes>["position"]>;\r
type Options = __IndicatorProps & { hidden?: boolean; arDis?: ElementProps["aria-disabled"] };\r
\r
function getStyles(selector: __Selector, options: Options) {\r
  const { unstyled, color, processing, inline, position, size, round, offset, arDis, ...opt } = options;\r
  const _offset = rem(offset);\r
  const [_position, _placement] = position!.split("-");\r
  function is<T>(initial: boolean | undefined, state?: T) {\r
    return initial ? ((state || "true") as T) : undefined;\r
  }\r
  function selected<T>(select: __Selector, state: T) {\r
    return selector === select ? (state as T) : undefined;\r
  }\r
  const removeStyle = typeof unstyled === "object" ? unstyled?.[selector] : unstyled;\r
  return {\r
    "data-position": position,\r
    ...ocx(\r
      selected("indicator", {\r
        "data-disabled": is(opt.disabled),\r
        "data-indicator": "indicator",\r
        "data-with-label": is(!!opt.label),\r
        "data-with-border": is(opt.withBorder),\r
        "data-processing": is(processing)\r
      })\r
    ),\r
    className: cn(\r
